nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-browed forest flycatcher
nodes.summary: White-browed forest flycatcher（Fraseria cinerascens）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-browed forest flycatcher。

nodes.name: White-browed forest flycatcher
nodes.summary: The white-browed forest flycatcher (Fraseria cinerascens) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found throughout the intra-tropical rainforest of Sub-Saharan Africa. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical swamps. References

nodes.name: Fraseria
nodes.summary: Fraseria（Fraseria）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如White-browed forest flycatcher、Fraser's forest flycatcher、Grey-throated tit-flycatcher等8种鸟类。
